'''Saber Squadron''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] founded by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] for the [[Eclipse Station]] in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. It consisted of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and non-Jedi, and was the personal elite squadron of Luke Skywalker. The original roster included Luke, [[Mara Jade Skywalker]], seven non-Jedi pilots, and six newly trained Jedi pilots, including [[Tam Azur-Jamin]].

During the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]], Sabers lost so many pilots that Luke combined it with [[Shocker Squadron]]. Later survivors of both squadrons would become the infamous [[Twin Suns Squadron]]. It would again become its original unit at the [[Second Battle of Obroa-skai]].
